# Boardroom CXO

> Executive search firm specializing in marketing, sales, business development, and operations leadership for jewelry, D2C, and consumer brands in India and the UAE. Places senior hires sourced directly from competitor companies and benchmarked on real (not CTC-slip) compensation data, rather than sourced from job-board databases.

Boardroom CXO is based in Surat, India, and serves clients across India and the UAE. The firm's differentiators: direct headhunting of passive candidates who are not actively job-hunting, market-mapping compensation before a mandate is priced, and verification of actual take-home pay (bank credit) rather than reported CTC — a known gap at legacy retail and jewelry brands.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://boardroomcxo.com/): positioning, market-signal statistics, and a live compensation-benchmarking tool by role/store-count/city-tier
- [About Us](https://boardroomcxo.com/about-us.html): firm history, placement track record, and team
- [Case Studies](https://boardroomcxo.com/case-studies.html): real placement outcomes, including finance, sales, and operations leadership hires
- [Resources](https://boardroomcxo.com/resources.html): field articles on executive hiring, compensation trends, and leadership case studies
- [Schedule a Call](https://boardroomcxo.com/schedule-a-call.html): contact and booking

## Articles

- [Why the Best Performance Marketers in Jewelry Are Not on Naukri](https://boardroomcxo.com/article-performance-marketer-jewelry.html): on the thin, non-job-hunting pool of marketers with real ROAS experience in the jewelry price range of ₹5,000–60,000
- [The Hidden Comp Gap: Why Jewelry Brands Keep Losing Candidates at the Offer Stage](https://boardroomcxo.com/article-hidden-comp-gap.html): field data on the gap between documented CTC and actual take-home pay at legacy jewelry/retail brands
- [Aukera Raised ₹90 Cr: Inside India's Lab-Grown Diamond Category Race](https://boardroomcxo.com/article-aukera-lab-grown-diamond-category-race.html): what Aukera's back-to-back funding rounds and a legacy conglomerate's entry signal about the leadership talent lab-grown diamond jewellery brands need to scale
- [Refused to Blink: The Boardroom Lesson Behind Marico's War With Hindustan Lever](https://boardroomcxo.com/article-marico-refused-to-blink.html): how Marico's founder rejected a 1999 buyout offer from Hindustan Lever and fought a four-front category war instead — a case study in founder-led leadership under existential pressure
- [Sanjiv Mehta: The HUL Leader Who Never Forgot Bhopal](https://boardroomcxo.com/article-sanjiv-mehta-crisis-leadership.html): how Sanjiv Mehta grew Hindustan Unilever's value 5x, closed the GSK Consumer merger, and doubled women in leadership, shaped by lessons from the Bhopal gas tragedy
- [Solitario's Netflix Moment Exposes a Marketing Hiring Gap](https://boardroomcxo.com/article-solitario-cultural-relevance-marketing-leadership.html): why an unpaid Netflix placement that spiked Solitario Diamonds' traffic reveals most jewelry and D2C brands have hired the wrong kind of marketing leader — for paid reach, not cultural relevance
- [Suresh Narayanan: The MD Who Walked Into the Maggi Ban](https://boardroomcxo.com/article-suresh-narayanan-maggi-crisis.html): how Suresh Narayanan took the Nestlé India MD role the same year 38,000 tonnes of Maggi were destroyed, and rebuilt the business to ₹20,000 crore

## Full text

- [llms-full.txt](https://boardroomcxo.com/llms-full.txt): complete plain-text content of every article listed above, for direct ingestion without crawling each page
